description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
An occupied Zoox autonomous vehicle (Vehicle 1) was traveling east on 24th Street toward Capp Street in San Francisco when a passenger 
vehicle (Vehicle 2) pulled out of the parking lane in an apparent attempt to merge into traffic.  The Zoox vehicle slowed and biased away 
from Vehicle 2, but the left front corner of Vehicle 2 made contact with the right rear wheel of the Zoox vehicle. The Zoox vehicle sustained
 minor damage to the right rear wheel. The police were notified and arrived at the scene. One of the passengers in the Zoox vehicle initially 
noted their "neck hurts", but later stated they were "good" and declined medical attention.
Print
Clear Form
